message:
feat(ffs-ondisk): add btrfs CRC32C checksum verification (bd-1sb)

Add verify_superblock_checksum() and verify_tree_block_checksum() for
btrfs with CRC32C support. Add BTRFS_CSUM_TYPE_* constants to ffs-types.
5 tests: valid/corrupt superblock, unsupported type, valid/corrupt tree
block.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
